description: Example OpenClaw cron registrations for openclaw-gmail-triage. Scripts auto-source $OPENCLAW_HOME/gmail.env when present; also set MCP gateway env to the same vars.

jobs.name: gmail-triage-digest
jobs.notes: Business: 7am + 5pm ET. Off-hours: 10pm + 2am ET. Requires gmail.env (CHROMA_URL, GMAIL_EMBED_URL, GMAIL_RETRIEVE_URL, GMAIL_SLACK_CHANNEL, GMAIL_AGENT_ID). Runner posts Slack after verify; skips empty digests.
